emails.subject: another action item
emails.body: another action item Tara, It appears that from December 1999 back (although I haven't checked everything), Kern historicals were loaded improperly (wrong column from the website). So, another major action item will be to reload those actuals. Mat

emails.subject: RE: another action item
emails.body: RE: another action item Did we fix this yet? I can't remember. We will have to wait on EPNG- probably sometime next week. UGH. I just want to get it done! To: Piazze, Tara

emails.subject: RE: another action item
emails.body: This one is fixed. To: Smith, Matt
